sourcePrompt: An SKS carbine, early-war NVA and VC issue, just over a meter long. A trim wood-stocked rifle with a fixed shallow magazine ahead of the trigger guard, a long barrel with a hooded front sight, and a folding spike bayonet stowed flat under the muzzle end. Warm honey-toned wood over blued steel, simple, slender and classic.
handEdit: Math.PI radian rotations converted to intended degrees (createPart rotation is degrees); offline rebake, no model call
